mapper.select: SELECT h.id AS hotDealId, hp.product_option_id AS productOptionId, h.title AS hotDealTitle, p.name AS productName, pp.picture_saved_location AS pictureLocation, hp.original_price AS originalPrice, hp.hot_deal_price AS hotDealPrice, FLOOR((hp.original_price - hp.hot_deal_price) / hp.original_price * 100) AS discountRate, po.stock AS stock, h.ends_at AS endsAt, GREATEST(0, FLOOR((CAST(h.ends_at AS DATE) - SYSDATE) * 86400)) AS remainingSeconds FROM hot_deals h JOIN hot_deal_products hp ON hp.hot_deal_id = h.id JOIN product_options po ON po.id = hp.product_option_id JOIN products p ON p.id = po.product_id LEFT JOIN product_pictures pp ON pp.id = ( SELECT MIN(pp2.id) FROM product_pictures pp2 WHERE pp2.product_id = p.id ) WHERE h.status = 'ACTIVE' AND h.deleted_at IS NULL AND SYSTIMESTAMP BETWEEN h.starts_at AND h.ends_at AND po.stock > 0 ORDER BY h.ends_at, h.id, hp.product_option_id
